2605.07646.title: MAVEN: Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing
2605.07646.paper_summary: While explicit reasoning trajectories enhance model interpretability, existing paradigms often rely on monolithic chains that lack intermediate verification, allowing early errors to cascade unchecked. This lack of modularity impedes granular auditing and compromises the epistemic trust required for high-stakes applications. We propose MAVEN (Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing), a blackboard-inspired framework designed to transform LLMs into deliberate reasoners through explicit role-decoupling. At its core, MAVEN operationalizes an adversarial Skeptic-Researcher-Judge loop, simulating expert deliberation by functionally separating logical defense from factual grounding. Experiments on OpenBookQA, TruthfulQA, HALUEVAL and StrategyQA benchmarks demonstrate that MAVEN delivers superior reasoning quality across four fine-grained metrics. Notably, MAVEN consistently outperforms latent reasoning models such as GEMINI-3.1-Pro and consensus-based baselines (e.g., ReConcile) by generating explicitly structured, modular, and verifiable deliberation trajectories, rather than relying on implicit internal states or post-hoc consensus. Moreover, comprehensive evaluations confirm that MAVEN is fully model-agnostic, serving as a strong and transferable reasoning booster that yields substantial performance improvements across diverse backbone models.
2605.07646.paper_summary_zh: 雖然明確的推理過程增強了模型的可解釋性，但現有的範式往往依賴於缺乏中間驗證的單一鏈條，允許早期錯誤不受控制地擴散。這種缺乏模塊化的特性妨礙了細緻的審計，並損害了高風險應用所需的認識信任。我們提出了MAVEN（多代理驗證-闡述網絡，具備即時認識審計），這是一個受黑板啟發的框架，旨在通過明確的角色解耦將大型語言模型轉變為深思熟慮的推理者。MAVEN的核心運作是一個對抗性的懷疑者-研究者-法官循環，通過功能性地將邏輯辯護與事實基礎分離來模擬專家的深思熟慮。在OpenBookQA、TruthfulQA、HALUEVAL和StrategyQA基準上的實驗表明，MAVEN在四個細緻的指標上提供了卓越的推理質量。值得注意的是，MAVEN在生成明確結構化、模塊化和可驗證的深思熟慮過程方面，始終優於潛在推理模型，如GEMINI-3.1-Pro，以及基於共識的基準（例如，ReConcile），而不是依賴於隱含的內部狀態或事後共識。此外，全面的評估證實MAVEN完全不依賴於模型，作為一個強大且可轉移的推理增強器，能在各種基礎模型上帶來顯著的性能提升。
2605.07646.author: Yinsheng Yao et.al.
2605.07646.authors: Yinsheng Yao, Jiehao Tang, Zhaozhen Yang, Dawei Cheng
